chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1537 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6104/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 31-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. The instant Constitutional Petition is pending on the file of this Court without any useful progress. The continuous absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie indicates that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
